spec.reasoning: The task involves deleting rows based on conditions in Column J and Column K. The instruction explicitly references 'Column J' and 'Column K' by letter, so renaming the headers does not change the column-letter references in the instruction — it only tests whether the agent hardcodes header names vs. uses column positions. We rename all headers at the same descriptiveness level (abbreviation→abbreviation, short→short). We also rename the sheet from 'Sheet2' to 'DataTab' to break hardcoded sheet references. A distractor column 'notes' is added after the last column (new column L) to test whether the agent incorrectly expands its data range or confuses column boundaries. We skip blank_row_insert and title_row_insert because the risk flags indicate the task deletes/inserts rows and depends on blank row positions — inserting blank rows could change the expected answer. instruction_paraphrase is false per the rules.
